name: Vinsmoke Sora
effect: [On Play] You may trash 1 card from your hand: If the number of DON!! cards on your field is equal to or less than the number on your opponent's field, add up to 1 {The Vinsmoke Family} type Character card with 4000 power or less from your trash to your hand.

name: Alvida
effect: [On K.O.] If your Leader has the {Cross Guild} type, play up to 1 Character card with a cost of 5 or less other than [Alvida] from your hand.

name: Stronger
effect: [Activate: Main] You may trash 1 card from your hand and trash this Character: If your Leader has the {Blackbeard Pirates} type, draw 1 card. Then, give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters –2 cost during this turn.

name: Jewelry Bonney
effect: [Blocker] [On Play] You may add 1 card from the top or bottom of your Life cards to your hand: Add up to 1 {Supernovas} type Character card with a cost of 5 from your hand to the top of your Life cards face-up.

name: Koala
effect: [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] Give up to 1 rested DON!! card to your Leader or 1 of your Characters.
